name: Telegram Notification Provider
description: Sends Metidos notifications through a Telegram bot.

env.description: Default Telegram bot token. This env var is the supported sharing point with Telegram ingress; chat IDs are configured only through plugin settings.

settings.label: Telegram chat ID
settings.description: Telegram chat ID for notifications. This must be configured as a setting; there is intentionally no chat ID environment variable.

settings.label: Telegram bot token
settings.description: Optional notification-only Telegram bot token. Falls back to TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.

settings.label: Disable web page previews
settings.description: Ask Telegram not to render link previews for notification messages.

notificationProviders.name: Telegram
notificationProviders.description: Sends Metidos notifications to a configured Telegram chat and returns provider receipts.
